meta.summary: mlst 2.35.0 runtime for scanning assemblies against bundled PubMLST typing scheme snapshots.
meta.description: mlst 2.35.0 runtime for scanning assemblies against bundled PubMLST typing scheme snapshots.

test: mlst --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'mlst 2.35.0' >/dev/null && mlst --help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '--scheme' >/dev/null && MLST_DBDIR=/opt/mlst/db mlst --info > /tmp/taf-mlst-info-$$.tsv && grep -F 'LOCII' /tmp/taf-mlst-info-$$.tsv >/dev/null && test $(wc -l < /tmp/taf-mlst-info-$$.tsv) -gt 2 && rm -f /tmp/taf-mlst-info-$$.tsv

micromamba list -n base | grep -E 'blast[[:space:]]+2\.16\.0[[:space:]]+' >/dev/null && micromamba list -n base | grep -E 'any2fasta[[:space:]]+0\.8\.1[[:space:]]+' >/dev/null && PERL5LIB=/opt/conda/perl5 perl -MPath::Tiny -MList::MoreUtils -MMoo -MJSON -MMLST::PubMLST -MMLST::Scheme -MMLST::Logger -MMLST::Requirements -e 'print q(perl-deps-ok)' | grep -F 'perl-deps-ok' >/dev/null && blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && makeblastdb -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'makeblastdb: 2.16.0+' >/dev/null && command -v any2fasta >/dev/null && { any2fasta -h 2>&1 || true; } | grep -iF 'any2fasta' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-mlst-full-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.fa "$tmp/fixture.fa"; cp /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.expected.tsv "$tmp/expected.tsv"; scheme=$(cut -f1 "$tmp/expected.tsv"); st=$(cut -f2 "$tmp/expected.tsv"); mlst --quiet --scheme "$scheme" --full "$tmp/fixture.fa" > "$tmp/out.tsv"; test -s "$tmp/out.tsv"; awk -F '\t' -v s="$scheme" -v st="$st" 'NR==2 && $2==s && $3==st {ok=1} END{exit !ok}' "$tmp/out.tsv"; grep -E 'PERFECT|NOVEL|OK' "$tmp/out.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-mlst-csv-gzip-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cp /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.fa "$tmp/fixture.fa"; cp /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.expected.tsv "$tmp/expected.tsv"; scheme=$(cut -f1 "$tmp/expected.tsv"); st=$(cut -f2 "$tmp/expected.tsv"); gzip -c "$tmp/fixture.fa" > "$tmp/fixture.fa.gz"; mlst --quiet --scheme "$scheme" --full --csv --outfile "$tmp/out.csv" "$tmp/fixture.fa.gz"; test -s "$tmp/out.csv"; head -n 1 "$tmp/out.csv" | grep -F 'FILE,SCHEME,ST,STATUS,SCORE,ALLELES' >/dev/null; grep -F "$scheme" "$tmp/out.csv" >/dev/null; grep -F ",$st," "$tmp/out.csv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

test -d /opt/mlst/db/pubmlst && test -s /opt/mlst/db/blast/mlst.fa.nhr && test -s /opt/mlst/share/doc/mlst/source.txt && test -s /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.fa && test -s /opt/mlst/share/testdata/fixture.expected.tsv && command -v mlst-make_blast_db >/dev/null && command -v find >/dev/null

upstream.name: mlst
upstream.license: GPL-2.0-only; bundled PubMLST-derived database snapshots retain their source citation and access-policy requirements
upstream.citation: Seemann T. mlst. https://github.com/tseemann/mlst; cite PubMLST according to upstream guidance, including Jolley et al. Wellcome Open Res. 2018;3:124. PMID: 30345391.
